What you like to do free time?
What like you do in free time?
Do you what like free time?
questions.answer: What do you like doing in your free time?

questions.question: Read: 'Lena spends her weekends gardening and baking cakes. She also loves reading novels.' How many hobbies does Lena have?
questions.explanation: Gardening, baking cakes, and reading = three hobbies.

questions.explanation: Chess and puzzles are indoor/mental activities.

questions.explanation: The text says animals and nature.

questions.question: Complete: 'My hobby is ___. I play it every day online.'?

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'It is raining and cold today. Emma is wearing a coat and boots.' What is the weather like?
questions.explanation: Raining and cold matches rainy and cold.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'In summer, it is usually hot and sunny in Italy. People go to the beach.' What season is described?

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'For lunch, Mia eats a sandwich, an apple and drinks water.' What does Mia drink?

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'Tom is vegetarian. He doesn't eat meat or fish. He loves vegetables and pasta.' What does Tom eat?
questions.explanation: Vegetarian: vegetables and pasta as stated.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'I have a mum, a dad, two sisters and a grandma.' How many family members are mentioned (not counting the speaker)?
questions.explanation: Mum, dad, two sisters, grandma = 5 people.

questions.question: Read: 'My uncle's daughter is my cousin. We go on holiday together every summer.' What is their relation?

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'The book is on the shelf next to the window. The lamp is on the desk.' Where is the book?
options: On the shelf next to the window
questions.answer: On the shelf next to the window
questions.explanation: The text clearly states on the shelf next to the window.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'Our flat is on the third floor. There is no garden but there is a big balcony.' What does the flat have?
questions.explanation: The text says a big balcony.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'Every day Sara wakes up at 6:30, has a shower and eats breakfast. Then she walks to school.' What does Sara do before walking to school?
options: She wakes up, showers and eats breakfast
questions.answer: She wakes up, showers and eats breakfast
questions.explanation: The text lists: wake up, shower, breakfast then walk to school.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'On weekdays, Mike always does his homework after school. He never watches TV before finishing it.' What does Mike always do after school?

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'The panda eats bamboo. It lives in forests in China.' Where does the panda live?
questions.explanation: The text says forests in China.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'Dolphins are mammals. They live in the sea but breathe air.' Are dolphins fish?
questions.explanation: The text says mammals, not fish.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'The Italian flag has three vertical stripes: green, white and red.' What colour is in the middle?
questions.explanation: Green, White, Red. White is in the middle.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'There are thirty students in our class. Fifteen are girls.' How many boys are there?

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'The doctor says you have a temperature. You must stay in bed and drink lots of water.' What is wrong with the patient?
questions.explanation: The text says you have a temperature.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'My knee hurts after football practice. I cannot run.' Which part of the body is hurt?
questions.explanation: The text clearly states my knee hurts.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'The museum is closed on Mondays. It opens Tuesday to Sunday from 9am to 6pm.' Can you visit on Monday?
questions.explanation: The text says closed on Mondays.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'Easter is usually in March or April. Schools have a short holiday.' In which season does Easter fall?
questions.explanation: March and April are spring months.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read: 'When you meet someone for the first time, you say: Hello, I am [name]. Nice to meet you.' What is the correct reply?
questions.explanation: Nice to meet you too = piacere mio.

questions.subject: inglese
questions.question: Read an email: 'Dear Mrs Green, I am writing to ask about the class trip. Yours sincerely, Tom.' What type of text is this?
questions.explanation: Dear Mrs Green and Yours sincerely are formal letter conventions.
